water.name: Silver Creek and Tributaries to Sworinger Lake

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(136) — Silver Creek and all other tributaries to Sworinger Lake (Modoc and Lassen Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (136) Silver Creek and all other tributaries to Sworinger Lake (Modoc and Lassen Cos.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: TopoZone — Sworinger Reservoir Topo Map, Modoc County, CA (Snake Lake Area)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 233132, "Silver Creek", Stream, CA, Lassen Co.
sources.quotedText: geometry (EPSG:3857 multipoint, converted to WGS84): mouth ~(-120.1380, 41.1555), headwaters ~(-120.0694, 41.1466); mouth point (nearer Sworinger Reservoir, ~4.8 km away) used as this record's water.lon/water.lat, replacing a prior guessed coordinate (-120.1100, 41.1600) that was ~2.4 km from the GNIS mouth point

parameters.note: Season spans the calendar-year boundary: open from the Saturday preceding Memorial Day (late May) through the last day of the following February, i.e. closed only during March, April, and early May.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through the last day of February
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through the last day in Feb.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a) unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so possession is also 2 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
